member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Conversion.ConvertDocumentsAgentTool
member.summary: Provides functionality to convert or copy supported document files between formats using disk-based operations.
member.remarks: Use this tool to handle requests for converting, copying, transforming, or exporting files such as .docx, .doc, .rtf, .pdf, .xlsx, .xls, .xlsm, .csv, or .txt. The tool reads files directly from disk and supports conversion from the .doc format but not exporting to it. For import operations, use specialized import tools instead.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Conversion.ConvertDocumentsAgentTool.#ctor(Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Core.DocumentRepositoryRegistry,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ConvertDocumentsAgentTool class with the specified document repository registry and output directory.
member.param: The registry containing document repositories to be used for document conversion operations. Cannot be null.
The directory path where converted documents will be saved. Must be a valid, writable directory.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Conversion.MergeDocumentsAgentTool
member.summary: Provides functionality to merge multiple document files from the file system into a single combined document. Supports merging .docx, .doc, .rtf, .pdf, .xlsx, .xls, and .csv files.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Conversion.MergeDocumentsAgentTool.#ctor(Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Core.DocumentRepositoryRegistry,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MergeDocumentsAgentTool class with the specified document repository registry and output directory.
member.param: The registry containing document repositories to be used for merging documents. Cannot be null.
The directory path where merged documents will be saved. Must be a valid, writable directory.
